campuses.rawText: Skip to main content Admissions Requirements How to apply Tuition & financial aid Campuses & majors Apply now Twitter Facebook Search Home Campuses & majors UC Berkeley Transfer admit data Berkeley: Transfer admit data This is a snapshot of the admitted transfer students for fall 2025. Please be cautious in drawing conclusions from this information. Use it as a general guide to selectivity and not as a predictor of your chance for admission to UC Berkeley. Admit data Applicants: 23,322 Admits: 5,603 Overall admit rate: 24% 91.5% of admitted transfer students were from California community colleges.
